name: test-coverage-scenarios
description: 4x4 test grid designed to exercise CellStateManager placement and threshold scenarios. Each cell has a specific coverage pattern for testing.

__comment_grid_layout: 4x4 grid — each cell tests a different sensor coverage pattern:
temp+hum+wind   temp+hum here    wind only        no sensors
temp only        temp+hum here    forest terrain   lake — no
(2,0)-(2,3): empty row — tests blind cells that never get events
cells.__comment_cell_00: FULL COVERAGE — all 3 types co-located in same cell
cells.__comment_cell_01: PARTIAL COVERAGE — temp+hum here, wind in adjacent cell (0,2)
cells.__comment_cell_02: WIND ONLY — sparse coverage, also serves adjacent (0,1)
cells.__comment_cell_03: BLIND SPOT — no sensors at all, no events should reach here
cells.__comment_cell_10: TEMP ONLY — single sensor type, coverage gap for humidity+wind
cells.__comment_cell_11: FAR WIND — temp+hum co-located, nearest wind is at (0,2) = distance ~1.4
cells.__comment_cell_12: FOREST — different terrain type, has temp sensor
cells.__comment_cell_13: WATER — sensors cannot be placed here (loader skips)

__comment_no_ignition: No ignition — this scenario tests sensor coverage, not fire spread
